fields.depicts: Ruins Of Alph Aerodactyl Item Room
Ruins Of Alph Ho Oh Item Room
Ruins Of Alph Kabuto Item Room
Ruins Of Alph Omanyte Item Room

fields.title: The Silver Case
fields.description: Give your rival's name to the officer at Professor Elm's lab.

fields.title: Flying in Father's Footsteps
fields.description: Defeat Falkner in Violet City and earn the Zephyr Badge.

fields.title: Clipping the Pigeon's Wings
fields.description:
Defeat
 Falkner in the Set battle style using only Johto Pokémon that do not 
exceed level 9 during battle and without using any Pack items - no 
external trade-only Pokémon.

fields.title: Criminal Underground
fields.description: Defeat the Rocket Grunt leading the raid on the Slowpoke Well.

fields.title: Entomology Prodigy
fields.description: Defeat Bugsy in Azalea Town and earn the Hive Badge.

fields.title: Did Someone Call an Exterminator?
fields.description:
Defeat
 Bugsy in the Set battle style using only Johto Pokémon that do not 
exceed level 16 during battle and without using any Pack items - no 
external trade-only Pokémon.

fields.title: No Crying over Spilt Milk
fields.description: Defeat Whitney in Goldenrod City and earn the Plain Badge.

fields.title: Attack of the Mad Cow
fields.description:
Defeat
 Whitney in the Set battle style using only Johto Pokémon that do not 
exceed level 20 during battle and without using any Pack items - no 
external trade-only Pokémon.

fields.title: Falsa Wood
fields.description: Catch the Sudowoodo on Route 36 and register it in the Pokédex.

fields.title: Have Eusine What I've Seen?!
fields.description: Complete the Eusine sidequest in the Burned Tower.

fields.title: The Future Is Fright
fields.description: Defeat Morty in Ecruteak City and earn the Fog Badge.

fields.title: In the Spirit of Battle
fields.description:
Defeat
 Morty in the Set battle style using only Johto Pokémon that do not 
exceed level 25 during battle and without using any Pack items - no 
external trade-only Pokémon.

fields.title: Bare-Fisted Beast Taming
fields.description: Defeat Chuck in Cianwood City and earn the Storm Badge.

fields.title: Black Belt in Training
fields.description:
Defeat
 Chuck in the Set battle style using only Johto Pokémon that do not 
exceed level 30 during battle and without using any Pack items - no 
external trade-only Pokémon.

fields.title: Working the Light Shift
fields.description: Cure Amphy at the top of the Olivine Lighthouse.

fields.title: Iron Maiden
fields.description: Defeat Jasmine in Olivine City and earn the Mineral Badge.

fields.title: Stainless Stealing Victory
fields.description:
Defeat
 Jasmine in the Set battle style using only Johto Pokémon that do not 
exceed level 35 during battle and without using any Pack items - no 
external trade-only Pokémon.

fields.title: Everybody Gets One
fields.description: Catch the red Gyarados in the Lake of Rage.

fields.title: Evil Makes Waves
fields.description: Thwart the efforts of Team Rocket at their hideout in Mahogany Town.

fields.title: Calling Off the Launch
fields.description: Defeat every Trainer at Team Rocket's Hideout in Mahogany Town.

fields.title: Out with the Cold, In with the New
fields.description: Defeat Pryce in Mahogany Town and earn the Glacier Badge.

fields.title: Braving a Brutal Blizzard
fields.description:
Defeat
 Pryce in the Set battle style using only Johto Pokémon that do not 
exceed level 31 during battle and without using any Pack items - no 
external trade-only Pokémon.

fields.title: Taken Off the Air
fields.description: Defeat every Rocket Executive in the Goldenrod Radio Tower.

fields.title: Golden-Rocket Roundup
fields.description: Defeat every Trainer in the Goldenrod Radio Tower and the Underground.

fields.title: Crystalline Catch
fields.description: Catch Suicune and register it in the Pokédex without using a Master Ball.

fields.title: Dragon's Destiny
fields.description: Defeat Clair in Blackthorn City and earn the Rising Badge.

fields.title: Down to the Last Breath
fields.description:
Defeat
 Clair in the Set battle style using only Johto Pokémon that do not 
exceed level 40 during battle and without using any Pack items - no 
external trade-only Pokémon or Legendaries other than the Beasts.

fields.title: Truthfulness Bears Rewards
fields.description:
Receive
 a Dratini with ExtremeSpeed at the Dragon Shrine by correctly answering
 every question of the Master's quiz on the first attempt.

fields.title: The Johto Journey's End
fields.description: Defeat the Elite Four and Champion Lance at the Pokémon League, and be crowned as the new Pokémon League Champion!

fields.title: Overcoming the Heavenly Kings
fields.description:
Defeat
 the Elite Four and Lance in a single session in the Set battle style 
using only Johto Pokémon that do not exceed level 44 during battle and 
without using any Pack items - no external trade-only Pokémon or 
Legendaries other than the Beasts.

fields.title: Struggle to the Top
fields.description: Defeat the Elite Four and Lance using only a single Pokémon.

fields.title: The Other Electric Soldier
fields.description: Defeat Lt. Surge in Vermillion City and earn the Thunder Badge.

fields.title: Shock to the System
fields.description:
Defeat
 Lt. Surge in the Set battle style using only Johto Pokémon that do not 
exceed level 46 during battle and without using any Pack items - no 
external trade-only Pokémon or Legendaries other than the Beasts.

fields.title: Born with a Twisted Spoon
fields.description: Defeat Sabrina in Saffron City and earn the Marsh Badge.

fields.title: Telepathic Miscommunications
fields.description:
Defeat
 Sabrina in the Set battle style using only Johto Pokémon that do not 
exceed level 48 during battle and without using any Pack items - no 
external trade-only Pokémon or Legendaries other than the Beasts.

fields.title: We're Gonna Give You the Power
fields.description: Return the stolen Machine Part to the staff of the Kanto Power Plant.

fields.title: The Third Water Wheel
fields.description: Defeat Misty in Cerulean City and earn the Cascade Badge.

fields.title: Poor, Washed-Up Mermaid
fields.description:
Defeat
 Misty in the Set battle style using only Johto Pokémon that do not 
exceed level 47 during battle and without using any Pack items - no 
external trade-only Pokémon or Legendaries other than the Beasts.

fields.title: Two Green Thumbs Up
fields.description: Defeat Erika in Celadon City and earn the Rainbow Badge.

fields.title: Slicing the Blades of Yesterday
fields.description:
Defeat
 Erika in the Set battle style using only Johto Pokémon that do not 
exceed level 46 during battle and without using any Pack items - no 
external trade-only Pokémon or Legendaries other than the Beasts.

fields.title: 'Cause You Know That You're Toxic
fields.description: Defeat Janine in Fuchsia City and earn the Soul Badge.

fields.title: Separating the "Ill" from "Illusions"
fields.description:
Defeat
 Janine in the Set battle style using only Johto Pokémon that do not 
exceed level 39 during battle and without using any Pack items - no 
external trade-only Pokémon or Legendaries.

fields.title: The Lazy Song
fields.description: Catch the Snorlax in Vermillion City and register it in the Pokédex.

fields.title: Rock-Solid Reunion
fields.description: Defeat Brock in Pewter City and earn the Boulder Badge.

fields.title: Gneiss Try, Mr. Jelly Donut!
fields.description:
Defeat
 Brock in the Set battle style using only Johto Pokémon that do not 
exceed level 44 during battle and without using any Pack items - no 
external trade-only Pokémon or Legendaries other than the Beasts.

fields.title: Home Is Where the Hot Is
fields.description: Defeat Blaine on Cinnabar Island and earn the Volcano Badge.

fields.title: Frying Up the Egg-Head
fields.description:
Defeat
 Blaine in the Set battle style using only Johto Pokémon that do not 
exceed level 50 during battle and without using any Pack items - no 
external trade-only Pokémon or Legendaries other than the Beasts.

fields.title: The Fallen Rival Returns
fields.description: Defeat Blue in Viridian City and earn the Earth Badge.

fields.title: Until Next Time... Smell Ya Later!
fields.description:
Defeat
 Blue in the Set battle style using only Johto Pokémon that do not 
exceed level 58 during battle and without using any Pack items - no 
external trade-only Pokémon or Legendaries other than the Beasts.

fields.title: Clash of the Champions
fields.description: Defeat Pokémon Trainer Red at the summit of Mt. Silver!

fields.title: To Train Them Is My Cause
fields.description:
Defeat
 Red in the Set battle style using only Johto Pokémon that do not exceed
 level 65 during battle and without using any Pack items - no external 
trade-only Pokémon; all Johto Legendaries allowed.

fields.title: A League of Your Own
fields.description: Defeat Red using only a single Pokémon.

fields.title: Beasts of the Brass
fields.description: Catch Entei and Raikou, the Volcano and Thunder Pokémon.

fields.title: Lightning in a Ball
fields.description: Catch Raikou and register it in the Pokédex without using a Master Ball.

fields.title: Pyroplastic Pacifier
fields.description: Catch Entei and register it in the Pokédex without using a Master Ball.

fields.title: Fateful Eye-to-Eye
fields.description: Catch Lugia, the Diving Pokémon, at the Whirl Islands.

fields.title: Serenity Beyond the Storm
fields.description: Catch Lugia and register it in the Pokédex without using a Master Ball.

fields.title: Phoenix of a Pure Heart
fields.description: Catch Ho-Oh, the Rainbow Pokémon, at the Tin Tower.

fields.title: At the End of the Rainbow
fields.description: Catch Ho-Oh and register it in the Pokédex without using a Master Ball.

fields.title: But Which Came First?
fields.description: Receive an Everstone from Professor Elm by showing him the hatched Mystery Egg.

fields.title: Apri-Cornucopia
fields.description: Receive a batch of at least 10 special Poké Balls at once from Kurt in Azalea Town.

fields.title: I Slept Like a Log...
fields.description: Encounter a sleeping Pokémon by using Headbutt on a tree.

fields.title: Served Shiny Side Up?
fields.description: Receive the Odd Egg from the Day-Care Man on Route 34.

fields.title: Megaton Chances
fields.description: See Golem by lining up two 7s on a slot machine at a Game Corner.

fields.title: Underage Gambling Pays Off!
fields.description: Earn a 7-7-7 on a slot machine at a Game Corner.

fields.title: Double Dozen Deduction
fields.description: Win a x24 bet in the Card Flip minigame at a Game Corner.

fields.title: Cast Your Net Far & Wide
fields.description: Win the Bug-Catching Contest at the National Park.

fields.title: Cuddly Crawlie Challenge
fields.description: Win the Bug-Catching Contest without catching a Butterfree, a Beedrill, a Scyther, or a Pinsir.

fields.title: Earning Style Points
fields.description: Win the Bug-Catching Contest with Cooltrainer Nick as a participant.

fields.title: Udder Selflessness
fields.description: Nurse Moomoo back to health at Moomoo Farm.

fields.title: Sorry, No Rare Candies!
fields.description: Have a Shuckle turn a Berry into Berry Juice after a battle.

fields.title: Worth Its Weight in Mold
fields.description: Get Mania of Cianwood City's permission to keep Shuckie by raising its Friendship high enough.

fields.title: Ferry Fountain Fridays
fields.description: Catch the Lapras in Union Cave and register it in the Pokédex.

fields.title: Let the Unown Be Known
fields.description: Solve each of the puzzle chambers and collect every hidden item in the Ruins of Alph.

fields.title: Scaling for Scaling
fields.description: Trade the Red Scale to Mr. Pokémon on Route 30 for the EXP Share.

fields.title: That Bass's Too Fat!
fields.description: Receive an Elixir from the Fishing Guru at the Lake of Rage by breaking the Magikarp size record.

fields.title: Go Ahead, Make My Day
fields.description: Receive all 7 gifts from each of the Week Siblings.

fields.title: Gambler's Charity
fields.description: Learn a new move from Bill's father outside the Goldenrod City Game Corner.

fields.title: Cruisin' for a Bruisin'
fields.description: Defeat every possible Trainer aboard the S.S. Aqua excluding those from the first voyage.

fields.title: Pokémania Runs in the Family
fields.description: Show all 5 requested Pokémon to Bill's grandfather on Route 25.

fields.title: This One's For You, Doll
fields.description: Receive a Pass for the Magnet Train from the Copycat in Saffron City.

fields.title: The Reel Pokédex
fields.description: Collect all 3 of the fishing rods.

fields.title: Lunatical Onlooker
fields.description: Receive a Moon Stone after witnessing the Clefairy ritual at Mt. Moon Square.

fields.title: The Thief's Last Stand
fields.description: Win the optional battle against your rival at Indigo Plateau.

fields.title: For That Nice & Shiny Coat
fields.description: Have Daisy Oak comb your Pokémon in Pallet Town.

fields.title: Cute, Soft, & Made with Love
fields.description: Own every Poké Doll purchased by Mom.

fields.title: The Anger of a Gentle 'Mon
fields.description: Have your Pokémon in the first slot use Frustration or Return at its maximum power.

fields.title: Didn't Know You Had It in You!
fields.description: Deal super effective damage with Hidden Power.

fields.title: Element of Generosity
fields.description: Receive an Evolution stone from a registered Pokégear Trainer.

fields.title: Deals on Wheels
fields.description: Promote the Miracle Cycle bike shop in Goldenrod City and be allowed to keep the bike.

fields.title: Our Store's Up High, But Our Prices Are Low
fields.description: Make a purchase in the Rooftop Sale on the roof of the Goldenrod Department Store.

fields.title: Password Perfectionist
fields.description: Add Buena's phone number to your Pokégear after earning 30 Blue Card points.

fields.title: Fun to Sell Off, Not to Eat
fields.description: Receive a Nugget from either Pokéfan Beverly or Pokéfan Derek.

fields.title: Practicing 1 Move 10,000 Times
fields.description: Receive a PP Up from Blackbelt Kenji.

fields.title: Strength from Numbers
fields.description: Receive a vitamin from every possible Trainer rematch that rewards one.

fields.title: Landly Legend
fields.description: Defeat every non-missable Trainer in Johto.

fields.title: Flourishing Findings
fields.description: Collect every visible and hidden field item in Johto.

fields.title: Urban Underdog
fields.description: Defeat every non-missable Trainer in Kanto.

fields.title: Colorful Collector
fields.description: Collect every visible and hidden field item in Kanto.

fields.title: Machine Learning
fields.description: Collect every finite TM and HM.

fields.title: Don't Give Them the Stick!
fields.description: Obtain a Stick from a wild Farfetch'd by either catching the Pokémon or stealing it.

fields.title: More Like the Orphan Club!
fields.description: Obtain a Thick Club from a wild Cubone or Marowak.

fields.title: Easter Surprise
fields.description: Obtain a Lucky Egg from a wild Chansey by either catching the Pokémon or stealing it.

fields.title: Game of Death-Defiance
fields.description: Clear the Battle Tower by defeating 7 Trainers in a row.

fields.title: Local Competition
fields.description: Clear the Battle Tower using only Johto Pokémon - no Lugia or Ho-Oh.

fields.title: Gotta Catch 'Em All - Crystal
fields.description: Catch all 206 possible Pokémon that are obtainable in-game without external devices.

fields.title: Meganium, Typhlosion or Feraligatr
fields.description: Evolve your starter to its third form.

fields.title: Zephyr Badge
fields.description: Defeat Falkner with all 46 possible Pokémon in the Pokédex.

fields.title: Hive Badge
fields.description: Defeat Bugsy with all 77 possible Pokémon in the Pokédex; Heracross is not required.

fields.title: Abra
fields.description: Catch an Abra or receive one from the Game Corner.

fields.title: Tyrogue
fields.description: Hatch a Tyrogue. (SAVE before you obtain the odd egg from the couple, read comments).

fields.title: Cubone
fields.description: Obtain a Cubone from the Game Corner.

fields.title: Wobbuffet
fields.description: Obtain a Wobbuffet from the Game Corner.

fields.title: Plain Badge
fields.description: Defeat Whitney with all 109 possible Pokémon in the Pokédex.

fields.title: Weezing
fields.description: Evolve Koffing or catch a Weezing.

fields.title: Fog Badge
fields.description: Defeat Morty with all 142 possible Pokémon in the Pokédex.

fields.title: Glacier Badge
fields.description: Defeat Pryce with all 150 possible Pokémon in the Pokédex.

fields.title: Seadra
fields.description: Catch a Seadra or evolve Horsea to Seadra.

fields.title: Mineral Badge
fields.description: Defeat Jasmine with all 154 possible Pokémon in the Pokédex.

fields.title: Storm Badge
fields.description: Defeat Chuck with all 154 possible Pokémon in the Pokédex.

fields.title: Rising Badge
fields.description: Obtain the badge from Clair with all 170 possible Pokémon in the Pokédex.

fields.title: Rhydon
fields.description: Catch a Rhydon or evolve Rhyhorn to Rhydon.

fields.title: Elite Four
fields.description: Defeat the Elite Four with all 174 possible Pokémon in the Pokédex.

fields.title: Muk
fields.description: Catch a Muk or evolve Grimer to Muk.

fields.title: Porygon
fields.description: Obtain a Porygon at the Game Corner.

fields.title: Larvitar
fields.description: Obtain a Larvitar at the Game Corner.

fields.title: Dugtrio
fields.description: Catch a Dugtrio or evolve Diglett to Dugtrio.

fields.title: Pikachu
fields.description: Catch a Pikachu or receive one from the Game Corner.

fields.title: Boulder Badge
fields.description: Defeat Brock with all 203 possible Pokémon in the Pokédex.

fields.title: Cascade Badge
fields.description: Defeat Misty with all 203 possible Pokémon in the Pokédex.

fields.title: Rainbow Badge
fields.description: Defeat Erika with all 203 possible Pokémon in the Pokédex.

fields.title: Thunder Badge
fields.description: Defeat Lt. Surge with all 203 possible Pokémon in the Pokédex.

fields.title: Soul Badge
fields.description: Defeat Janine with all 203 possible Pokémon in the Pokédex.

fields.title: Marsh Badge
fields.description: Defeat Sabrina with all 203 possible Pokémon in the Pokédex.

fields.title: Volcano Badge
fields.description: Defeat Blaine with all 203 possible Pokémon in the Pokédex.

fields.title: Earth Badge
fields.description: Defeat Blue with all 203 possible Pokémon in the Pokédex.

fields.title: Trainer Red
fields.description: Defeat Red with all 206 possible Pokémon in the Pokédex.

House to the right of the Gym
Wise Trio - All three Beasts caught Crystal Only

Dept. Store - 5F Trade Abra for Machop Crystal Only

Dept. Store- Sunday, Lead Pokémon Unhappy
Dept. Store- Sunday, Lead Pokémon Happy
Woman in house, lead pokemon happy
Mr. Pokémon, traded for Red Scale

Miltank Lady - Cure the Sick Miltank
